name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗 FEND1Iconic Peekaboo Small Handbag, Cuoio Romano leather, featuring
hand-stitched details and classic turn-lock on both sides. Brown leather lining, two compartments separated by hard dividers, with an internal zip pocket and silver hardware. Bag comes with handle and adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody. Dimensions 23*11*18.
